name: psi-swarm-monorepo
description: Lighthouse, run many times across realistic device/network presets. See the p50/p75/p90/p99 of your Web Vitals, not one noisy point.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --workspace cli run build

engines.comment: Lighthouse 12 has a known incompatibility with Node 24 (TraceEngineResult performance mark). Use Node 22 LTS.

author: Sarthak Agrawal
